* fix(loader): ensure override config takes priority over auto-resolve

Load the .amproj.toml override config BEFORE auto-resolving content
URIs from <media> elements. Auto-resolve now skips URIs that have
entries in the override config, ensuring Force set entries always
take priority.

Previously, auto-resolve ran first and override ran second. While
HashMap::insert correctly overwrites, the code structure was
misleading — the comment said override was only for URIs 'that lack
automatic filename mappings'. Now the intent is explicit: override
URIs are collected upfront and auto-resolve skips them.

commit.message:
[WIP] Fix tags on settings/local page for clickability (#943)

* Initial plan

* Fix tag format on settings/local page: convert cache keys to proper tag@origin format

Cache keys stored in localStorage use colon-separated format (e.g. tag:@origin,
tag@origin:@default), which makes tags not clickable on the settings/local page.

- Add cacheKeyToTag() helper to convert cache keys to proper tag@origin format
- Update getExtKeys() to use converted tags for display/routing and raw keys for deletion
- Update template to use entry.key for deletion and entry.tag for display
- Track by entry.key instead of entry.tag to avoid duplicate tracking issues
